reviews.comment:
Atención bastante ágil, varios empleados y merecen renglón aparte muy amables y serviciales. Somos personas mayores y nos ayudan con tema tecnología App etc. Siempre vamos ahí.

(Translated by Google)
Very responsive service, with several employees who deserve a special mention. They're very friendly and helpful. We're seniors, and they help us with technology, apps, and other issues. We always go there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHd2ZhTjZBRRAB
